---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
#bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
options(xtable.comment = FALSE)
library(reshape)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(xtable)
library(pracma)
library(this.path)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
options(width = 180)

# --- Panel A
data <- readRDS("../../tmp/drs/estimation/size_dynamics.RDS")[size_type == "logtna"]
tmp <- unique(data[, list(var)])
tmp[, var_idx := 1:nrow(tmp)]
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "var")
data[, var := paste0(var_idx, "_", var)]
rm(tmp)

# add stars
cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", coef))]
data[, ss_lab := sapply(data[, ss], function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 0,
    paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
    "$"
  )
})]
data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
data[, ss_lab := NULL]
data[, se_lab := paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(se, 3)), ")$")]
rm(cuts)

est <- cast(data[, list(var, spec_idx, coef_lab)], var ~ spec_idx) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number(), type = "coef") %>%
  as.data.table()
est[is.na(est)] <- ""
est[, var := c("$q_{i,t-1}$", "$R_{i,t}$", "$Perf_{i,t-1}$", "$LogAge_{i,t-1}$", "$ExpRatio_{i,t-1}$", "$PerfVol_{i,t-1}$", "$BretAve_{i,t-1}$", "$BretVol_{i,t-1}$")]

se <- cast(data[, list(var, spec_idx, se_lab)], var ~ spec_idx) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 1, type = "se_lab") %>%
  mutate(var = "") %>%
  as.data.table()
se[is.na(se)] <- ""

tbl <- rbind(est, se)[order(group_id)]
rm(est, se)

# note controls
ctrls <- data.table(
  var = c("Fund FE", "Date FE"),
  `1` = c("Y", "Y"), `2` = c("Y", "Y"),
  `3` = c("Y", "N"), `4` = c("Y", "N"), group_id = 1000 + 0:1, type = ""
)
tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, ctrls)
rm(ctrls)

obs_and_r2 <- unique(data[, list(spec_idx, obs, r2 = ar2)]) %>%
  mutate(
    obs = comma(obs),
    r2 = paste0("$", sprintf("%.3f", r2), "$")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(., -spec_idx) %>%
  pivot_wider(name, names_from = "spec_idx", values_from = "value") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(name = replace(name, name == "r2", "Adj $R^2$")) %>%
  mutate(name = replace(name, name == "obs", "Obs")) %>%
  rename(var = name) %>%
  mutate(group_id = 2000 + 0:1, type = "")
tbl <- bind_rows(tbl, obs_and_r2)
rm(obs_and_r2)
tbl[, c("group_id", "type") := NULL]
tbl_A <- copy(tbl)

# --- Panel B

data <- readRDS("../../tmp/drs/estimation/size_dynamics_fe.RDS")[size_type == "logtna"]
data <- data[, .(
  x_mean = mean(phi),
  sd = sd(phi),
  q01 = quantile(phi, .01),
  # q05 = quantile(phi, .05),
  q25 = quantile(phi, .25),
  q50 = quantile(phi, .50),
  q75 = quantile(phi, .75),
  # q95 = quantile(phi, .95),
  q99 = quantile(phi, .99)
), spec_idx]

# Identify the columns to format (all except spec_idx)
cols_to_format <- setdiff(names(data), "spec_idx")
data[, (cols_to_format) := lapply(.SD, function(x) sprintf("%.3f", x)), .SDcols = cols_to_format]
data <- t(data) %>%
  as.data.table(., keep.rownames = "statistic") %>%
  setDT()
names(data) <- names(tbl_A)
data <- data[var != "spec_idx"]
data$var <- c("Mean", "SD", "1\\%", "25\\%", "50\\%", "75\\%", "99\\%")
tbl_B <- copy(data)
rm(data)

col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:4, ")")))))
names(col_names) <- names(tbl_A)
tbl_A <- rbind(col_names, tbl_A)
tbl_B <- rbind(col_names, tbl_B)
rm(col_names)

tbl <- rbind(tbl_A, tbl_B)
rm(tbl_A, tbl_B)

align_vactor <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vactor)

this_add_to_row <- list(
  pos = list(-1, 0, 16, 18, 21, 23, nrow(tbl)),
  command = c(
    "\\toprule \\multicolumn{5}{c}{Panel A: Fund size process ($q_{i,t}$)} \\\\\n \n \\cmidrule(l){2-5}",
    rep("\\vspace{5pt}", 3),
    "\\hline \\multicolumn{5}{c}{Panel B: Fund fixed effects ($\\phi_i$)} \\\\\n \n \\cmidrule(l){2-5} \\vspace{5pt} \n",
    "\\vspace{5pt}",
    "\\bottomrule \n"
  )
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
  file = "reg_size_dynamics.tex"
)
```
